title: PayPal Q4 2022 Earnings Preview: What To Expect
text: Analysts expected Q4 adjusted EPS to grow nearly 8% to $1.20 and revenue to increase 7% to $7.39 billion. PayPal faced headwinds from pandemic tailwind fade and e-commerce growth slowdown. Revenue grew 11% year-over-year to $6.85 billion in Q3 2022, while adjusted EPS fell 2% to $1.08. Investors were disappointed with 7% revenue growth guidance for Q4 2022. PayPal raised full-year 2022 earnings guidance reflecting productivity initiatives with $900 million cost savings in 2022 and at least $1.3 billion in 2023.
